name: ListIndexTool
description: Lists indices in the OpenSearch cluster. If an index name or pattern is specified, return only information about the provided index or index pattern. The include_detail flag controls output: if False, returns only index name(s); if True (default), returns full metadata.

opensearch_cluster_name.description: The name of the OpenSearch cluster

index.description: The name of the index or index pattern to get information for.

include_detail.description: Whether to include detailed information. If False, returns only index name(s). If True, returns full metadata.

name: IndexMappingTool
description: Get the mapping information for an OpenSearch index.

opensearch_cluster_name.description: The name of the OpenSearch cluster

index.description: The name of the index to get mapping information for

name: SearchIndexTool
description: Search an OpenSearch index using query DSL. For keyword-type fields use field name DIRECTLY. For date/time range queries MUST include format parameter.

opensearch_cluster_name.description: The name of the OpenSearch cluster

index.description: The name of the index to search in

query_dsl.description: The search query in OpenSearch query DSL format.

size.description: Number of search results to return. Maximum allowed value is 100.

name: GetShardsTool
description: Get shard information for an OpenSearch index.

opensearch_cluster_name.description: The name of the OpenSearch cluster

index.description: The name of the index to get shard information for

name: GetClusterStateTool
description: Get the cluster state of an OpenSearch cluster.

opensearch_cluster_name.description: The name of the OpenSearch cluster

metric.description: Limit the information returned to the specified metrics. Options: _all, blocks, metadata, nodes, routing_table, routing_nodes, master_node, version

index.description: Limit the information returned to the specified indices

name: GetSegmentsTool
description: Get segment information for OpenSearch indices.

opensearch_cluster_name.description: The name of the OpenSearch cluster

index.description: Limit the information returned to the specified indices. If not provided, returns segments for all indices.

name: CatNodesTool
description: Get node information for an OpenSearch cluster in cat format.

opensearch_cluster_name.description: The name of the OpenSearch cluster

metrics.description: A comma-separated list of metrics to display. Available: id, name, ip, port, role, master, heap.percent, ram.percent, cpu, load_1m, load_5m, load_15m, disk.total, disk.used, disk.avail, disk.used_percent

name: GetIndexInfoTool
description: Get detailed information for an OpenSearch index. Wildcards are supported.

opensearch_cluster_name.description: The name of the OpenSearch cluster

index.description: The name of the index to get detailed information for. Wildcards are supported.

name: GetIndexStatsTool
description: Get statistics for an OpenSearch index. Wildcards are supported.

opensearch_cluster_name.description: The name of the OpenSearch cluster

index.description: The name of the index to get statistics for. Wildcards are supported.

metric.description: Limit the information returned to the specified metrics. Options: _all, completion, docs, fielddata, flush, get, indexing, merge, query_cache, refresh, request_cache, search, segments, store, warmer, bulk

name: GetQueryInsightsTool
description: Get query insights (top queries) from an OpenSearch cluster.

opensearch_cluster_name.description: The name of the OpenSearch cluster

name: GetNodesHotThreadsTool
description: Get hot threads information from OpenSearch nodes.

opensearch_cluster_name.description: The name of the OpenSearch cluster

name: GetAllocationTool
description: Get allocation information for an OpenSearch cluster.

opensearch_cluster_name.description: The name of the OpenSearch cluster

name: GetLongRunningTasksTool
description: Get information about long-running tasks in an OpenSearch cluster.

opensearch_cluster_name.description: The name of the OpenSearch cluster

limit.description: The maximum number of tasks to return.

name: GetNodesTool
description: Get node information from an OpenSearch cluster.

opensearch_cluster_name.description: The name of the OpenSearch cluster

node_id.description: A comma-separated list of node IDs or names. Supports filters like _local, _master, master:true, data:false. Defaults to _all.

metric.description: A comma-separated list of metric groups. Options: settings, os, process, jvm, thread_pool, transport, http, plugins, ingest, aggregations, indices. Defaults to all metrics.

name: CreateSearchConfigurationTool
description: Create a search configuration in OpenSearch for use in experiments.

opensearch_cluster_name.description: The name of the OpenSearch cluster

query.description: The search query in OpenSearch DSL format as a JSON string. Use %SearchText% as a placeholder for the search term.

name: GetSearchConfigurationTool
description: Get a search configuration by ID from OpenSearch.

opensearch_cluster_name.description: The name of the OpenSearch cluster

search_configuration_id.description: ID of the search configuration to retrieve

name: DeleteSearchConfigurationTool
description: Delete a search configuration from OpenSearch.

opensearch_cluster_name.description: The name of the OpenSearch cluster

search_configuration_id.description: ID of the search configuration to delete

name: GetQuerySetTool
description: Get a query set by ID from OpenSearch.

opensearch_cluster_name.description: The name of the OpenSearch cluster

query_set_id.description: ID of the query set to retrieve

name: CreateQuerySetTool
description: Create a query set in OpenSearch for use in search quality experiments.

opensearch_cluster_name.description: The name of the OpenSearch cluster

queries.description: JSON array of queries, e.g. ["query1", "query2"] or [{"queryText": "query1"}]

description.description: Optional description of the query set

name: SampleQuerySetTool
description: Sample queries from an OpenSearch index to create a query set.

opensearch_cluster_name.description: The name of the OpenSearch cluster

query_set_size.description: Number of top queries to sample

sampling.description: Sampling method: topn (most frequent), random, pptss (probability-proportional-to-size), all

description.description: Optional description of the query set

name: DeleteQuerySetTool
description: Delete a query set from OpenSearch.

opensearch_cluster_name.description: The name of the OpenSearch cluster

query_set_id.description: ID of the query set to delete

name: GetJudgmentListTool
description: Get a judgment list by ID from OpenSearch.

opensearch_cluster_name.description: The name of the OpenSearch cluster

judgment_id.description: ID of the judgment list to retrieve

name: CreateJudgmentListTool
description: Create a judgment list in OpenSearch for relevance evaluation.

opensearch_cluster_name.description: The name of the OpenSearch cluster

judgment_ratings.description: JSON array of query-ratings objects. Each object must have 'query' (string) and 'ratings' (array of {"docId": string, "rating": number}).

description.description: Optional description of the judgment list

name: CreateUBIJudgmentListTool
description: Create a judgment list derived from UBI (User Behavior Insights) click data in OpenSearch.

opensearch_cluster_name.description: The name of the OpenSearch cluster

click_model.description: Click model used to derive relevance from UBI click data. Common value: 'coec' (Clicks Over Expected Clicks)

max_rank.description: Maximum rank position to consider when computing click signals

start_date.description: Start date for UBI event filtering in ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD)

end_date.description: End date for UBI event filtering in ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD)

name: DeleteJudgmentListTool
description: Delete a judgment list from OpenSearch.

opensearch_cluster_name.description: The name of the OpenSearch cluster

judgment_id.description: ID of the judgment list to delete

name: CreateLLMJudgmentListTool
description: Create a judgment list using LLM-generated relevance ratings in OpenSearch.

opensearch_cluster_name.description: The name of the OpenSearch cluster

query_set_id.description: ID of the query set to use for generating judgments

search_configuration_id.description: ID of the search configuration that defines how documents are retrieved

model_id.description: ID of the ML Commons model connector used to generate LLM relevance ratings

size.description: Number of top documents to retrieve per query for rating

context_fields.description: JSON array of document field names to include as context for the LLM, e.g. ["title", "description"]. Defaults to all fields.

name: GetExperimentTool
description: Get an experiment by ID from OpenSearch.

opensearch_cluster_name.description: The name of the OpenSearch cluster

experiment_id.description: ID of the experiment to retrieve

name: CreateExperimentTool
description: Create a search quality experiment in OpenSearch. Supports PAIRWISE_COMPARISON (2 configs), POINTWISE_EVALUATION (1 config + judgments), and HYBRID_OPTIMIZER (1 config + judgments).

opensearch_cluster_name.description: The name of the OpenSearch cluster

query_set_id.description: ID of the query set to use for the experiment

search_configuration_ids.description: JSON array of search configuration IDs. PAIRWISE_COMPARISON requires exactly 2, POINTWISE_EVALUATION and HYBRID_OPTIMIZER require exactly 1.

size.description: Number of results to retrieve per query

judgment_list_ids.description: JSON array of judgment list IDs. Required for POINTWISE_EVALUATION and HYBRID_OPTIMIZER.

name: DeleteExperimentTool
description: Delete an experiment from OpenSearch.

opensearch_cluster_name.description: The name of the OpenSearch cluster

experiment_id.description: ID of the experiment to delete

name: GenericOpenSearchApiTool
description: Execute a generic OpenSearch API call with a specified HTTP method, path, and optional request body.

opensearch_cluster_name.description: The name of the OpenSearch cluster

method.description: HTTP method (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, etc.)

body.description: Optional request body for the API call
